title: Loop Control Statements Project
tagline: Build a mini application using Loop Control Statements
description: Create a working Python application demonstrating Loop Control Statements.
starterCode:
# Python implementation for Loop Control Statements
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
solution:
# Python implementation for Loop Control Statements
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
solutionExpl: This solution demonstrates clean application of Loop Control Statements in Python.
